title: senecio recurvatus
intro: Senecio recurvatus, also known as Hook and needle bush, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio recurvatus include its potential to treat conditions such as liver disease, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an anti-arthritic and anti-bacterial agent. Senecio recurvatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in South Africa.
